title: Introducing GPT-5
content_snippet: OpenAI today introduced GPT-5, outlining new reasoning improvements, safer tool use, and broader enterprise deployment plans.

title: OpenAI's GPT-5 lands with stronger reasoning and enterprise controls
content_snippet: According to OpenAI's blog post https://openai.com/blog/gpt-5-release, GPT-5 adds better agentic workflows and stricter tool controls. Original link: https://openai.com/blog/gpt-5-release TechCrunch notes the launch could reshape enterprise assistant rollouts this quarter.

title: 36Kr recaps OpenAI GPT-5 launch and overseas coverage
content_snippet: 36Kr reports that OpenAI's GPT-5 launch is already driving broad industry reaction. Source: https://techcrunch.com/2026/04/02/openai-gpt-5-report Original link: https://openai.com/blog/gpt-5-release The article references the TechCrunch report and the official OpenAI Blog announcement while summarizing the rollout for a Chinese audience.
